class.name: VaporTrail
class.description: VaporTrail allows you to add 3D trails via an emitter, have the shape defined by a curve and colored with a gradient. You can set the alignment of the trail mesh to camera or any of the axes of the emitter (X, Y, Z).

members.member: Whether the trail is currently emitting new points.
Defines mesh orientation: Camera, X, Y, or Z axis.

Node path for mesh placement when the active camera cannot be fetched (e.g. when using viewports). Also allows the trail to fade out instead of abruptly disappearing when the VaporTrail node is removed.
How many points the mesh can have. Defines how detailed and how long the trail is along with [member update_interval].
How often a new point is pushed to the mesh when moving. Lower values result in a smoother trail.
Material applied to the mesh. Billboarding via material will break things as the mesh itself is already billboarded.
Width of the trail ribbon in units.
Adjusts point sizes along the trail to give it shape. Affects [member minimum_onscreen_size].
Ensures the mesh will not be smaller than the given amount of pixels when rendered. Only applies to trails with Camera alignment.
Applies color variation to the trail.
Applies simple animation by shifting the texture positioning in the UV x axis.
Controls how UV coordinates are calculated along the trail. Fixed: linear UV progression (head at 0, tail at 1). Rolling: distance-based UV progression (texture rolls along trail).
Temporal position from 0 to 1, intended to be driven externally (e.g. with a tween).
Applies a size modifier to the trail based on [member current_time]. Applied multiplicatively with [member size] and [member size_curve].
Applies a color modifier to the trail based on [member current_time]. Applied multiplicatively with [member color_gradient].
